parents.subject: LU-15194 llite: Fix page size readahead window

commit.subject: LU-15274 llite: Add forward/reverse to window
commit.message:
LU-15274 llite: Add forward/reverse to window

The pos-in-window function can tell us if a read is
before or after our current location.  This is critical for
identifying reverse reads, so add it in.

This is just a small preparatory patch.

Test-parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iac94eccdb1a57f1ac95bf877aa8c91e557f535d3
